items.final_wording: Lists suicidal ideation or attempt, risk of harm or neglect, moderate or severe depression, and psychotic or bipolar features as escalation concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression
source.population: Adults presenting with suspected or established depressive symptoms; emergency, severe, psychotic, bipolar, or safeguarding presentations require escalation.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth depression documentation and risk screening; treatment, diagnosis, and local emergency pathways remain clinician-led.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists suicidal ideation or attempt, risk of harm or neglect, moderate or severe depression, and psychotic or bipolar features as escalation concerns.

items.rationale: Supports psychosis as a clinician-assessed red flag in depressive presentations for psychosis symptom screening; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician assessment of suicide, self-harm, harm or neglect, protective and support factors, mental status, cognition, insight, substance use, medical contributors, medication history, thyroid testing, and selected blood testing when indicated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression
source.population: Adults presenting with suspected or established depressive symptoms; emergency, severe, psychotic, bipolar, or safeguarding presentations require escalation.

source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth depression documentation and risk screening; treatment, diagnosis, and local emergency pathways remain clinician-led.

exact_location.heading: Section 7 — risk, mental-status examination, and selected investigations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician assessment of suicide, self-harm, harm or neglect, protective and support factors, mental status, cognition, insight, substance use, medical contributors, medication history, thyroid testing, and selected blood testing when indicated.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-completed mental-status and risk documentation for psychosis symptom screening; no decision is generated.
